name: RPlog_Something_s_Going_To_Get_You
title: The Mourners of Polly
summary: In a dim Ord Mantell cantina, New Republic Star Ops pilots Raxis and Rebecca discuss a rumor of a creature attacking freighters in the system. Their conversation is interrupted by two outlandish pirates, the quarren Captain Salty Jack and his Mon Calamari first mate Barnacle Bill, who stagger in to mourn their lost parrot Polly and rant about a 'creature of the black' that devoured their ship, the Freedom Fish. As the drunken pirates bicker, threaten one another, and lapse into superstition, Raxis presses them for the location of the attack while Rebecca keeps a wary hand on her blaster. The pirates toast Polly's memory and pour suspect ale, which Raxis covertly spits out, before the pilots gather what little coordinate information they can. Raxis and Rebecca depart to investigate the threat, leaving the grieving pirates to keep drinking.
